fixed_findings.title: pendingCount derived from stale in-memory snapshot — can double-dispatch tasks already in-flight
fixed_findings.fix: Changed tasks.filter to freshTasks.filter so pendingCount reflects the post-dispatch store state, preventing double-dispatch of in-flight tasks.

fixed_findings.title: DockerSandboxRunner mounts worktree as root with no read-only flag
fixed_findings.fix: buildDockerArgs now appends :ro to the worktree volume mount for all phases except install (needsNetwork===true), preventing container escape writes to the worktree during build/typecheck/lint/test phases.

fixed_findings.title: DockerSandboxRunner falls back to in-worktree execution without requiring IFLEET_ALLOW_SANDBOX_FALLBACK
fixed_findings.fix: Added isTestMode field (true when cfg.spawnFn is injected by tests). The fallback guard now checks !this.isTestMode instead of NODE_ENV==='production', so the IFLEET_ALLOW_SANDBOX_FALLBACK requirement applies in all non-test environments including dev and staging.

open_findings.title: Concurrent cost-log appends can interleave and corrupt costs.json lines
open_findings.note: Requires atomic write refactor with tmp+rename; deferred — low frequency in practice

open_findings.title: Git auth token exposed via process args visible to local ps
open_findings.note: Requires git credential helper integration; tracked, no quick fix

open_findings.title: defaultHaikuCall passes full prompt as argv — visible in ps aux
open_findings.note: Requires stdin pipe refactor; comment in code acknowledges acceptable risk for classifier

open_findings.title: issue-commenter.ts lastCommentId mutable closure races if comment() called before waitForApproval resolves
open_findings.note: Latent — not currently exploitable in linear pipeline; deferred

open_findings.title: workers/claude.ts passes full brief as -p argv — visible in ps aux
open_findings.note: Requires stdin pipe to claude CLI; tracked upstream

open_findings.title: orchestrator-core package imports back into root src/ via relative paths — breaks package isolation
open_findings.note: Requires cross-package refactor; tracked as architectural debt

open_findings.title: durationMs computed from wrong timestamp when sprint is paused
open_findings.note: Metrics only; deferred pending sprint metrics refactor
